title: Purpose
doc_html:
§2120.12. Purpose

            The purpose of this Part is to authorize the Louisiana Department of Health to promulgate and publish rules and regulations to provide for the licensure of nurse staffing agencies.

            Acts 2022, No. 577, §1.
doc_text:
§2120.12.  Purpose
The purpose of this Part is to authorize the Louisiana Department of Health to
promulgate and publish rules and regulations to provide for the licensure of nurse staffing
agencies.
Acts 2022, No. 577, §1.
